transcription.text: Simplicity's new 8-horsepower lawn tractors make picture book lawns easy as baby see. Free-floating mower action follows ground contours for anti-skull blowing, regardless of dips or ridges. Now get Simplicity quality at a surprisingly low price. And remember, when it comes to lawn and garden care, Simplicity wrote the book. Look for your Simplicity dealer in the yellow pages, or call toll-free.
